slices.lastFinding: FE-9 Slice 1 complete + stacked on PR #66 (NOT merged). adminKeys FE-9 roots; admin-engagement.ts query module; SweepButton canonical primitive (§C.4) + tests; /engagement route segment; MSW handlers. Built against ENRICHED EngagementWidgetItem/SweepResult (§H(a) item 1). Fix round 1: prettier + SweepButton done-state race (clear stale reset timer before re-run) + regression test. THREE-LAYER GREEN on commit 3636ad4: checks/e2e/migration-chain/docker-build all completed/success; Gitar APPROVED. Advanced to Slice 2.

FE-9 Slice 2 complete + stacked on PR #66 (NOT merged). admin-grade-reviews.ts (verdict-aware list + 3-action resolve); VerdictTile primitive (§B.2, reused by sibling calibration) + tests; /review route (server page + Pattern C error + client GradeReviewQueue with ?verdict=/?selected= URL state, auto-select, deep-link fallback via verdict=all since no single-row endpoint, QueueList, enriched DetailPane, OverrideDrawer); MSW handlers; 6 integration tests. Built to enriched/wired contract (verified: row enriched, ?verdict= wired). Fix round 1: 2 Gitar advisory nits — writeParams useCallback + superRefine co-located substitute validation. THREE-LAYER GREEN on commit feeabb6: all 11 checks (checks/e2e/migration-chain/docker-build x-runs) completed/success; Gitar APPROVED 3/3 resolved. Advanced to Slice 3.

FE-9 Slice 3 complete + stacked on PR #66 (NOT merged). admin-loops.ts (status-aware GET + approve/reject mutations, reject wires {reason}); /loop route (server page + Pattern C error + client LoopQueue: ?status= server-side filter, LoopTable, Approve/Reject modals, 409 handling); MSW handlers; 5 integration tests. Pre-build verification all favorable (enriched row, ?status= wired, reject {reason} body). Route /loop (singular) per Rail.tsx:67. No new Gitar findings. THREE-LAYER GREEN on commit d5d0a1d: all 11 checks completed/success; Gitar APPROVED. Advanced to Slice 4.

FE-9 Slice 4 complete + stacked on PR #66 (NOT merged). adminKeys systems roots (cost/calibration/system); admin-cost.ts (useCostSummary, local CostSummaryResponse type cast — endpoint is untyped inline dict §H(b)10); /cost route (server page + Pattern C error + read-only CostDashboard: summary strip, alert pills, provider bars, model table, deferred daily placeholder, range selector); MSW handler; 6 integration tests. Fix round 1: Gitar advisory — inline Pattern C BoundaryFrame on query.isError across ALL FOUR FE-9 query pages (cost/engagement/loop/grade-review) matching catalogue convention + 3 error-state tests. THREE-LAYER GREEN on commit 99e89d4: all 11 checks completed/success; Gitar APPROVED 4/4 resolved. Advanced to Slice 5.

FE-9 Slice 5 complete + stacked on PR #66 (NOT merged). admin-calibration.ts (flagged GET + run/resolve mutations); VerdictTile generalised (optional score + subtitle) so calibration action tiles reuse it without regressing grade-review; bandFromLevel extracted to primitives/bands.ts (shared); /calibration route (run section, session-local summary strip, per-pill drift table, flagged table with ?pill= client filter, resolve modal with 3 tiles + conditional JSON editor, inline isError boundary); MSW handlers; 6 integration tests. Pre-build verification favorable (enriched row, action enum, ?pill= client-side). Nav: no calibration rail entry yet (§H(b)14) — Slice 7 adds it. No new Gitar findings. THREE-LAYER GREEN on commit 0d80f60: all 11 checks completed/success; Gitar APPROVED. Advanced to Slice 6.
Slice 6 opened: System page (FE-9-admin-systems.md §B.3). Reuses SweepButton for op cards (bootstrap/drive-ingest/realism/safety-links). Pre-build contract verification + build next.

notes.chainBootstrap: Overwrites the prior tooling-state chain per the nextChain convention. This is the FE-9 admin-operations chain (fe-specs/FE-9-admin-ops.md). Slice list is seeded with Slice 1 (engagement); subsequent slices append as they open.
notes.mergeModel: SINGLE PR (#66) spans all 7 FE-9 slices. Commits STACK on the branch; the PR stays OPEN across slices. After each slice reaches three-layer green (CI checks + Gitar review + GitHub mergeable), advance currentIndex and auto-continue into the next slice — DO NOT merge. The Q4=B `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch` close-out fires ONCE, only after Slice 7 (ops landing + nav extension + checklist close + handover). 7 slices total. Confirmed anchors: Slice 1 = engagement /engagement (this slice); Slice 2 = grade-review queue /review; Slice 7 = ops landing + nav + checklist close + handover (close-out). Slices 3–6 per the approved plan body (not re-derived here).
notes.specDriftNote: Spec prose (FE-9-admin-ops.md §B.4) repeatedly assumes the pre-enrichment sparse EngagementWidgetItem/SweepResult shape with §H(a) item 1 'not yet landed'. The backend OpenAPI schema now carries the enriched fields (testee_name/pill_or_test_name/assigner_name/days_stale/reminders_sent/escalated on the row; first/second_reminders_sent/assignments_processed/duration_ms/last_swept_at on the result). Per the spec's own conditional instructions ('once that lands, replace the fallback'), Slice 1 builds to the enriched contract. Not a halt-class drift — the spec pre-decided this path.
notes.routeNote: Engagement ships at top-level /engagement (Rail.tsx:49 shipped contract), not /admin/engagement as the spec prose loosely writes. Mirrors how /ops is also a top-level (admin)-group segment.
notes.ciWaitMechanism: subscribe_pr_activity only pushes CI FAILURE events + review comments — it does NOT push CI SUCCESS. Do not wait for a 'green' webhook (it never arrives). To detect three-layer green, actively poll `pull_request_read get_check_runs` (a Monitor until-loop is the sanctioned wait; foreground sleep is blocked) until every run is completed/success, then advance. Keep the subscription for what it delivers: failure alerts + reviewer comments.
notes.haltReasonVocabulary: haltReason is one of `spec-drift`, `circuit-breaker`, `user-pause`, or null (no halt).
notes.writeSemantics: Writes are atomic (write-temp + rename). The file is committed so chain state survives session restart. Per-slice `fixRounds` arms the (b) circuit breaker — a fourth increment is the halt signal.
